data.content: Implementation complete on branch feat/foolery-6aaf-version-pill (e14229f2243c). VersionBadge converted from static span to Popover-wrapped button. On click, fetches /api/version?force=1 and shows one of four states: loading spinner, 'Update now to v{version}', 'Latest version installed', or error fallback. AbortController cleans up on popover close. Tests (7 passing) verify button rendering, cursor-pointer, version-badge class, monospace font, and green dot. Story added for visual review. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, test, build).
